---
title: "Sabyon+grub+ ubuntu?"
date: 2006-11-23
forum: General Help
---

### Post by haxer on 2006-11-23
Hello im off to install sabyon on my other hdd.. will grub complain? or will it work perfectly? anything i should know? :-k

---

### Post by christhemonkey on 2006-11-23
It should work fine, you just need to run ```
sudo update-grub
``` To update your menu.lst an then it should all be howdy-doody!

ps:
010011100110111100100001001000000101010001101000011000010111010001110011001000000110111001101111011101000010000001100001001000000111011001100101011100100111100100100000011011100110100101100011011001010010000001110011011010010110011101101110011000010111010001110101011100100110010100100001

---

### Post by christhemonkey on 2006-11-24
No problem :D
